## Definition of Done (DoD)
- [ ] All AC ticked
- [ ] Coverage ≥70% on changed files (≥85% Tier 0/1)
- [ ] CONTEXT.md updated per bubble-up rule
- [ ] ADR(s) written if architectural decisions made
- [ ] Reviewer fleet PASS on all child tasks
- [ ] DEMO confirms behavior
- [ ] G5 post-merge feedback positive
- [ ] No production incidents in 7d trust window
